{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Meet the twinkling troublemakers of the holiday season—our Christmas ornaments, ready to add a dash of sparkle and a lot of charm to your tree!
|affct=FAME
|hard=RUSH
|source=[[Snowy Xmas]] Dec. 20 2024 - Jan. 02 2025
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=7
|fire=5
|wind=8
|form=Dragon
|element=Wind
|realm=Rift
|orangehard=DEF
}}
